item.aggressiveaircraft.machine_gun.desc: High-speed forward-firing weapon using large-caliber ammunition
item.aggressiveaircraft.heavy_cannon.des: Heavy cannon turret firing high-explosive shells
item.aggressiveaircraft.heavy_bomb_bay.d: Large bomb bay capable of dropping aerial bombs
item.aggressiveaircraft.homing_rocket_la: Infrared homing rocket launcher that locks onto targets before firing
item.aggressiveaircraft.cluster_dispense: Aerial dispenser that releases explosive submunitions
